arts.ttl: Sheffield United boss on West Brom’s “incredibly strong squad” as Blades look to maintain form
arts.sum: This Sunday, the Hawthorns will host a fascinating clash as seventh-placed West Bromwich Albion take on second-placed Sheffield United. West Brom enter this game on the back of a frustrating run of results. Three consecutive draws have extended their run to nine draws in their last ten games. While the Baggies have proven tough to […] The post Sheffield United boss on West Brom’s “incredibly strong squad” as Blades look to maintain form appeared first on Sheff United Way.

arts.ttl: West Brom vs Sheffield United predictions: Blades’ injuries offer Baggies a chance
arts.sum: Promotion hopefuls West Brom and Sheffield United face off in the Championship on Sunday and Aaron Rogan feels that an entertaining game with goals at both ends is on the cards.

arts.ttl: There is a lot right about West Brom under Carlos Corberan
arts.sum: Most supporters only see their team’s home games, so Baggies fans have only witnessed four goals in total with two of those coming in the same match. Albion’s home form is their biggest problem with only four goals scored in eight games, with five of those ending in draws and four finishing goalless.

arts.ttl: Grady Diangana, Paddy McNair and injury updates on six West Brom players
arts.sum: When he is set to return, though, is another matter after a specialist that Diangana paid a visit to discovered an issue with a nerve, which is the source of the pain. He has been working this week with the medical staff, so it's a pity but still we need to be patient in managing this special injury.

arts.ttl: How West Brom boss Carlos Corberan responded when asked about Wolves manager links
arts.sum: "I came here just to be focused on giving you answers to questions on the game we are going to play against Sheffield United," he said, ahead of the welcoming of the Blades to The Hawthorns for a televised fixture on Sunday. Carlos Corberan refused to be drawn on speculation linking him with a move from West Bromwich Albion to arch rivals Wolverhampton Wanderers, after a report emerged in his native Spain on Friday suggesting he had jumped to the top of their wanted list.
